flow_points: Oman scored 47 runs for the loss of 3 wickets in the Powerplay (RR: 7.83).
Oman's loss of 3 wickets in the Powerplay prevented building a stable foundation.
A Zampa delivered a crucial spell, taking 4 wickets for 22 runs in 3.2 overs.
Zampa's performance sustained defensive pressure with an impact score of 144.4.
GJ Maxwell supported with 2 wickets for 13 runs from 3 overs.
Australia dominated their Powerplay, scoring 73 runs for no loss (RR: 12.17).
MR Marsh anchored Australia's innings, scoring 64 runs from 33 balls.
Marsh's innings contributed 59.3% of Australia's total runs.
This significant contribution from Marsh was central to Australia's victory.
Australia secured a convincing win by 9 wickets.
